title: ScopeResult
description: NDJSON output for the atomwrite scope subcommand. Emits one per-file event (type: scoped) when the scope matches, followed by a final summary event (type: summary).

type.description: Event discriminator. 'scoped' for the per-file event, 'summary' for the final rollup, 'error' on failure.

path.description: Absolute path of the file that was scoped (absent in summary events).

language.description: Language used to parse the file (e.g. rust, python, javascript).

query.description: Prepared query name (e.g. comments, fn, struct) or custom AST pattern that was applied.

action.description: Action applied to the matched scopes: delete, upper, lower, titlecase, squeeze, or replace-with.

scopes_matched.description: Number of AST scopes that matched the query in this file.

bytes_before.description: File size in bytes before the scope action was applied.

bytes_after.description: File size in bytes after the scope action was applied.

checksum_before.description: BLAKE3 checksum of the file before the scope action.

checksum_after.description: BLAKE3 checksum of the file after the scope action.

mtime_preserved.description: Whether the original mtime was preserved (true) or updated to reflect the change (false). Default is false since v0.1.3+.

dry_run.description: True if the scope action was previewed without writing.

files_visited.description: Total files examined (present in summary event).

files_matched.description: Files where at least one scope matched (present in summary event).

files_skipped.description: Files where no scope matched or that were excluded (present in summary event).

error.description: Error message string when type is 'error'.

code.description: Machine-readable error code when type is 'error'.
